PR #7 correctness review (Codex CLI 0.145.0, gpt-5.6-sol, read-only sandbox).

Verbatim: "Findings: []. Overall assessment: No correctness defects found. Verified through: official coverage.py configuration documentation (report:precision); static inspection of installed coverage.py 7.15.2 and pytest-cov 7.1.0 source; read-only function probe: 98.51 passes at precision 0 and fails at precision 2; diff/touch-set and internal documentation cross-check. The ADR and plan accurately describe the rounding behavior and pytest-cov's raw-value FAIL message. The only ancillary effect is expected: coverage percentages are now displayed to two decimal places. No measurement or branch-coverage behavior changes. Full pytest execution was not attempted because the sandbox is read-only."

--- Post-review delta note (orchestrator, attested at final head 57bb1f2) ---
Single-round battery on 1c-file diff converged with zero blocking findings.
Post-review commit 57bb1f2 applies the validated wording fixes: ADR 0005 now
records the one-sidedness of the original blind spot, the residual
[98.995, 99.0) rounding window at precision 2 (three-leg convergence), and
the declined rounding-free fail_under=100 alternative. Doc-only delta;
verification: clean tree 58 tests / 100.00% / exit 0, breach case exits 1.
